mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity_config WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY priority ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM activity_config WHERE status = 1 AND start_time <= NOW() AND end_time >= NOW() ORDER BY priority ASC, create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE activity_config SET name = #{name}, type = #{type}, discount_rate = #{discountRate}, fixed_discount = #{fixedDiscount}, min_amount = #{minAmount}, stackable = #{stackable}, priority = #{priority}, status = #{status}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, description = #{description}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
